get.description: Gets a List of Events

parameters.name: id[]
parameters.description: Filter by Event ID

parameters.name: sku[]
parameters.description: Filter by Event SKU

parameters.name: team[]
parameters.description: Filter by Teams that participated in the Event

parameters.name: season[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Season that the Event belonged to

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Filter by the Start Date of the Event

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Filter by the End Date of the Event

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Filter by the region of the event

parameters.name: level[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Event Level

parameters.name: eventTypes[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Event Type

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Items per page. Defaults to 25. Regular keys are capped at 100 and unlimited keys at 10000.

parameters.name: eventSearch
parameters.description: Case-insensitive regex search across event name, SKU, venue, city, region, and postcode.

get.description: Gets a Single Event

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Event

parameters.name: number[]
parameters.description: Filter by Team Number

parameters.name: grade[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Grade of the Team

parameters.name: country[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Country of the Team

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Items per page. Defaults to 25. Regular keys are capped at 100 and unlimited keys at 10000.

parameters.name: teamSearch
parameters.description: Case-insensitive regex search across team ID, team number, team name, and team region.

get.description: Gets a List of Awards at a given Event

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Event

parameters.name: team[]
parameters.description: Filter by Team Number that the Award was awarded to

parameters.name: winner[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Winner of the Award (can include people's names, etc.)

parameters.description: Pagination page number. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Items per page. Defaults to 25. Regular keys are capped at 100 and unlimited keys at 10000.

get.description: Gets a List of Matches for a single Division of an Event

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the Event

parameters.name: div
parameters.description: The ID of the Division

parameters.name: team[]
parameters.description: Filter to only return Matches which involved given Teams

parameters.name: round[]
parameters.description:
Filter by the Round of the Match.
Some typical values are shown below:
- 1 - Practice
- 2 - Qualification
- 3 - Quarter-Finals
- 4 - Semi-Finals
- 5 - Finals
- 6 - Round of 16
- etc.

parameters.name: instance[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Instance of the Match. This is used to describe which Quarter-Final match (for example) is being played

parameters.name: matchnum[]
parameters.description: Filter by the MatchNum of the Match. This is the actual Match "number", e.g. Qualification Match, or the individual match in a Best of 3

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Items per page. Defaults to 25. Regular keys are capped at 100 and unlimited keys at 10000.

parameters.description: Pagination page number. Defaults to 1.

parameters.description: The ID of the Event

parameters.name: div
parameters.description: The ID of the Division

parameters.name: team[]

parameters.name: rank[]
parameters.description: Filter by the Rank

get.description: Returns global skills rankings for a program, season, and grade. Grade must be an integer: 1 (Elementary), 2 (Middle School), 3 (High School), 4 (College).

parameters.name: program
parameters.description: The program (viqrc, v5rc, vurc)

parameters.name: season
parameters.description: The RobotEvents Season ID

parameters.name: grade
parameters.description: Grade level: 1 (Elementary), 2 (Middle School), 3 (High School), 4 (College)

get.description:
Returns V5RC team rankings with predictions.
        
        Sorting metrics (passed in 'sort'):
        - 'superscore': Calculated composite score (Default)
        - 'trueskill': TrueSkill MU value
        - 'trueskill_sigma': TrueSkill Sigma (Uncertainty, sorted ASC)
        - 'epa': Calculated EPA (Total)
        - 'auto_skill': Autonomous performance metric
        - 'offense' / 'defense': Specific playstyle ratings
        - 'ccwm': Calculated Contribution Over Margin
        - 'wins' / 'matches': Play history volume

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Metric to sort by

parameters.name: season[]
parameters.description: Filter by season IDs

parameters.name: team[]
parameters.description: Filter by team IDs

parameters.name: rank[]
parameters.description: Filter by calculated rank range

get.description:
Returns VIQRC team rankings with predictions.
        
        Sorting metrics (passed in 'sort'):
        - 'superscore': Calculated composite score (Default)
        - 'trueskill': TrueSkill MU
        - 'trueskill_sigma': TrueSkill Sigma (ASC)
        - 'epa': Calculated EPA
        - 'opr': Offensive Power Rating
        - 'avg_score': Avg Match Score
        - 'max_score': Max Match Score
        - 'wins' / 'matches': Historical performance volume
        - 'alliance_luck': Luck/RNG assessment

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Metric to sort by

parameters.name: season[]
parameters.description: Filter by season IDs

parameters.name: team[]
parameters.description: Filter by team IDs

parameters.name: rank[]
parameters.description: Filter by rank range

info.title: RoboSTEM API v3
info.description:
An API to access VEX competition data.

## Request Metadata
Pagination is performed the same way throughout each pageable endpoint using query parameters `page` and `per_page` (per_page default is 25 with a maximum of 100).
Please note that dates should be formatted according to RFC3339.

designation.description: Some awards are given out per tournament or division
